name: Petal 1 Visa

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. Earn cash back through Petal Offers at select merchants.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 2% to 10% cash back at select merchants through Petal Offers
1% cash back on all other eligible purchases (introductory); increases to up to 1.5% after 6 months of on-time payments (for qualifying cardholders)

other_benefits.name: Credit building
other_benefits.description: Reports to all three major credit bureaus; on-time payments build credit history

other_benefits.name: Credit limit increase path
other_benefits.description: Potential for credit limit increase in as little as 6 months with responsible use

other_benefits.name: No fees
other_benefits.description: No annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, no late fees, no penalty fees

notes: Petal 1 is a no-fee credit card designed for people with limited or no credit history. $0 annual fee and no foreign transaction fees. Variable APR: 28.99%–33.99% (high). Credit limits: $300–$5,000. Earn 1%–10% cash back through Petal Offers at select merchants; base rate starts at 1% and can increase to up to 1.5% after demonstrating responsible use. Reports to all three credit bureaus. Petal uses cash flow analysis (bank account history) for underwriting rather than traditional credit score alone.
